name: Mumbai Weekend Demand Spike
description: D2C + marketplace velocity jumps for Boston / Arizona / Gizeh across Mumbai. Agents protect hero SKU fill-rate before online stockout.

name: Marketplace Flash Sale
description: Myntra and Amazon orders surge on Arizona Black and Boston Taupe. Allocation agent prioritizes channels by margin + SLA.

name: Inbound Receipt Mismatch
description: Warehouse vision flags size and count mismatch before stock becomes available to promise.

name: Return Rush Restock
description: Returns arrive after sale event; restock agent grades and relists Grade A returns to D2C before fresh replenishment.
